nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for complex or nuanced tasks
nodes.grounding_span: simple tasks that would be time consuming for me but easy for an AI model

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to supplement it and have it list ideas that give me a general idea

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment and meaningful engagement
nodes.grounding_span: Tasks that I find fun or tasks that I want to busy my time with

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI misunderstanding of complex financial concepts
nodes.grounding_span: Some AI models have a hard time understanding complex issues in the financial space

nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to work through problems with it and sharpen the responses

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: draw out different aspects of the idea and make it into my own

nodes.label: Human relationships and personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy the personal feeling of going through those surveys and reading them thoroughly

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: simple tasks that would be time consuming for me but easy for an AI model

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability in work
nodes.grounding_span: Some AI models have a hard time understanding complex issues in the financial space

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I try to only delegate simple tasks to it and that usually works out well

nodes.label: Cautious approach to AI in financial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Some AI models have a hard time understanding complex issues in the financial space and that has made me frustrated

nodes.label: Preference for manual handling of enjoyable tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Tasks that I find fun or tasks that I want to busy my time with rather than doing nothing usually end up being done by me rather than AI

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I think I have a good system and I don't feel the need to change it, however times change and likely my use of AI could change along side it

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to work through problems with it and sharpen the responses of the model

nodes.label: Selective delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: I try to only delegate simple tasks to it
